title: Law Firm Vazquez Nava Consultores y Abogados, S.C ransomware incident

victim.name: Law Firm Vazquez Nava Consultores y Abogados, S.C

extortion.description: The Firm Vazquez Nava Consultores y Abogados, S.C. was founded in Mexico City in January 1995 by a group of professionals with a broad experience in fields such as Economics, Law, Administration and Engineering. Since its foundation, the Firm has actively participated in the development and structuring of some of the most important projects in Mexico, playing an important role in implementing the best practices for transparency, accountability and anti-corruption measures.
